questions.notes: Core entity lookup should still return the canonical deer node first
Temporal phrasing should surface the event node ahead of broader project context

questions.prompt: What changed in DeerPrint production on Apr 1 and Apr 2?
questions.notes: Date shorthand plus product name should keep the DeerPrint production memory on top

questions.prompt: What is Brian's stance on soft deletes?
questions.notes: Architecture preference phrasing should resolve through Brian's canonical memory

questions.prompt: Which project belongs to Brian personally instead of Dirt Road Systems?
questions.notes: Negative ownership wording should still choose the Brian-owned project instead of the company node

questions.prompt: What project is not owned by Dirt Road Systems?
questions.notes: Contrasting ownership query should favor the exception, not the dominant company association

questions.prompt: What is Big Jerry connected to?
questions.notes: Graph-aware phrasing should keep the anchor entity first even when neighbors are expanded

questions.prompt: Which file should I read for Brian's durable profile, USER.md or the graph summary?
questions.notes: When query wording names a durable profile file, retrieval should still center the canonical Brian node rather than a stray adjacent node
